title: カレンダーに印もつけてた

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: And that's a wrap. All done with work for the day!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Right, so, I'm here as a customer now! Time to
grab some of those new cosmetics that came—

text_block_list.name: Manager
text_block_list.text:
Oh, did you have your eye on those? The
customer just now took the last one!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Nooo! You've gotta be kidding! That was what
kept me motivated all day!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan is feeling down after missing out on
the cosmetics that she wanted.
